categories.title: Bladed
categories.description: Edged weapons that cause bleeding wounds.
categories.offenseAbilityText: Target bleeds, losing 1 resistance per round for bonus rounds.

categories.title: Blunt
categories.description: Heavy impact weapons that shatter defenses.
categories.offenseAbilityText: On kill, destroys one random modifier on target position.
categories.defenseAbilityText: Absorb first bonus points of damage before resistance takes hits.

categories.title: Explosive
categories.description: Area-of-effect weapons that damage multiple targets.
categories.offenseAbilityText: Splash bonus damage to adjacent positions.
categories.defenseAbilityText: Attackers must exceed defense by bonus extra to kill.

categories.title: Ranged
categories.description: Reach weapons that strike from distance.
categories.offenseAbilityText: Can target any enemy position, not just front-line.
categories.defenseAbilityText: Deal bonus damage to any crew placed on adjacent positions.

categories.title: Stealth
categories.offenseAbilityText: No counter-damage when attacking. Attacker takes zero retaliation.
categories.defenseAbilityText: First bonus attacks against this position miss entirely.
